_AccidentHazardSearchOutput.description: Placeholder output schema for GovAPITool registration.
_AccidentHazardSearchOutput.title: _AccidentHazardSearchOutput

description:
Input schema for koroad_accident_hazard_search.

Uses a 10-digit 행정동 code (adm_cd) and a calendar year to look up
the KOROAD accident hazard spots for that municipality.

adm_cd.description: 10-digit 행정동 administrative code. Obtain from a locate adapter that returns adm_cd, such as kakao_address_search, juso_adm_cd_lookup, or sgis_adm_cd_lookup. Example: '1111000000' for 서울특별시 종로구.
adm_cd.title: Adm Cd

num_of_rows.description: Rows per page. Maps to the official data.go.kr numOfRows wire parameter. Example: 20.
num_of_rows.title: Num Of Rows

page_no.description: 1-indexed result page. Maps to the official data.go.kr pageNo wire parameter.
page_no.title: Page No

year.description: Calendar year for the accident dataset. 2023+ uses 강원특별자치도(51)/전북특별자치도(52) codes automatically. Example: 2024.
year.title: Year

title: koroad_accident_hazard_search
